description: Wave 1 router contract for the deterministic 9709 recovery pilot manifest.

route_hint_policy.description: route_hint is an advisory freeze input, not permission to bypass review or to skip extraction.
route_hint_policy.unknown_surface_rule: If any surface field is null, the router preserves review posture but should still attempt extraction-first routing unless a stronger review trigger such as gate_critical applies.

manifest_surface_value_contract.null_meaning: unknown in this freeze; null must not be coerced to false by the router

selected_when: question stem and subquestion boundaries are layout-driven rather than spatially ambiguous
surface flags are still unknown but the row only needs extraction-first review posture rather than immediate triage
question depends on coordinate graph, geometry diagram, or spatial evidence
OCR alone cannot recover the question meaning
AO cannot converge on a stable topic candidate
a second-pass review is required after extraction rather than before extraction

runtime_freeze.data_residency_note: Single China-hosted DashScope compatible endpoint for the whole wave-1 pilot run; do not mix endpoints inside the same manifest/backfill/gate replay batch.
